children.text: a summary of the activities carried out with such grant and an assessment of the impact of such activities on meeting the purposes of part A;
a summary of the activities carried out in such year with any grant received under part B by such State;
the evaluation result of programs and projects;

an explanation of how the Federal funds provided under this subchapter were coordinated with State agencies receiving Federal funds for drug abuse education, prevention, treatment, and research activities; and
such other information as the Director may require by rule.
the aggregate amount of grants made under part A and part B to such State for such fiscal year;
the amount of such grants awarded for each of the purposes specified in part A;
a summary of the information provided in compliance with paragraphs (1) and (2) of subsection (a);

an explanation of how Federal funds provided under this subchapter have been coordinated with Federal funds provided to States for drug abuse education, prevention, treatment, and research activities; and
evaluation results of programs and projects and State strategy implementation.
